purpose: Narrow feature mask for identity-preserving local inpaint detail iteration after the full face mask caused gray-mask failure and identity drift.

white_regions: left eye-adjacent micro ellipse x=250 y=276 w=74 h=56
right eye-adjacent micro ellipse x=438 y=276 w=74 h=56
nose/central skin micro ellipse x=326 y=330 w=110 h=92

mask_geometry.intent: Limit generation to small facial detail regions and avoid full-face replacement.

next_action: Run a local VAEEncode plus SetLatentNoiseMask inpaint sample and compare whole-image visual QA against baseline and v2.
